title: Establish sampling program
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Establish sampling program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Establish a valid sampling plan

pcs.text: Recognise and use sampling tables from relevant Australian Standard
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and use sampling tables from relevant Australian Standard?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and use sampling tables from relevant Australian Standard.
